allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/analyze -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text":"This clearly demonstrates X.","mode":"premium"}')
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(m['name']\) for m in d.get\('models',[]\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); models=[m['name'] for m in d.get\('models',[]\)]; print\('Models:', models\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import os; keys=[k for k in os.environ if 'anthropic' in k.lower\(\) or 'ANTHROPIC' in k]; print\('Found:', keys\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {p['name']:12} {p['label']}\\"\) for p in d['providers']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f\\"  {a['name']} → {a['bias_type']}\\"\) for a in d['agents']]")
